name: qch-dev-assistant
description: Project-specific Codex skills for developing, validating, balancing, and preparing the QCH game.

interface.shortDescription: Codex guidance for QCH code, assets, QA, balance, and release work.
interface.longDescription: A local project plugin that teaches Codex how to navigate the QCH Next.js game, audit media assets, verify visual changes, review gameplay balance, and prepare changes for GitHub.
defaultPrompt: Use QCH Codebase to find where this feature belongs.
Use QCH Assets to audit the media library.
Use QCH Release before sending changes to GitHub.
